title: Xtra Arrows Retexture
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1I2JRpgl/images/348eeff9a87672184e1c07ad1e440131a24eb043.png)

**Xtra Arrows Retexture** changes the appearance of *Xtra Arrows* to a more familiar vanilla-like style. (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xtra-arrows).

# "Retexture" became part of the original project
